title: Cif Wild Orchid Floor Cleaner residue-free surface cleaner for linoleum, vinyl and ceramic tiles 950 ml
features: Cif Wild Orchid Floor cleaner is a multi-purpose cleaner that will leave your floor residue-free and sparkling clean
Our floor cleaning products are ideal for linoleum, vinyl and ceramic tiles
Cif Wild Orchid floor cleaner cuts through stubborn dirt
Cif tile surface cleaner has a fresh Wild Orchid fragrance
A brilliant shine makes it a perfect bathroom floor cleaner
Our Cif Multi-purpose floor cleaner makes sure that all your surfaces are 100% beautifully clean and looking their very best
description: Product Description Experience the beauty of Cif Wild Orchid Floor Cleaner. Our floor cleaner leaves your floor residue-free and shiny clean with a scent of fresh flowers. Cif Floor cleaners are specially formulated to cut through stubborn dirt on floors and washable surfaces around your home, whether it’s your kitchen, bathroom or living room. Cif Wild Orchid Floor cleaner is an all-purpose surface cleaner that can be used on a number of surfaces such as linoleum, vinyl and ceramic tile and is residue-free to leave a brilliant shine. At Cif we believe in revealing and protecting beauty for everyone to enjoy every day. That’s why for over 50 years, Cif products have removed ugly dirt, without damage – providing you with beautiful results. We develop cleaning products that solve the problems you face, while simultaneously caring for surfaces. Cif will help you achieve the beautiful results you want: whatever the surface, whatever the room, whether it’s a quick spruce-up or a full deep clean. Looking for a wooden floor and laminate floor cleaner? Try our Wood Floor Cleaner which is specially formulated for sealed wood such as varnished wood and laminate floor. How to use: Dilute Usage: Pour 2 caps of Cif Floor Cleaner in half a bucket of water (5 litres). No need to rinse. Neat Usage: Pour on a wet sponge or directly on the surface. Rinse after cleaning. Ingredients <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Phenoxyethanol, Perfume, Linalool Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: get medical advice/attention. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Read label before use. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. Causes serious eye irritation. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever UK Ltd, Springfied Drive, Leatherhead, KT22 7GR.
